metadata.title: Japan officials look to levy new tax on EVs and plug-ins from 2028 - Nikkei Asia
metadata.description: TOKYO -- Japanese lawmakers in the ruling coalition and government officials aim to roll out new taxes on electric vehicles and plug-in hybrids accord
